title: Best pregnancy tests | Bin Diving

recommendations.product_name: First Response Early Result Pregnancy Test (Early Result)
pros: Earliest detection (up to 6 days before missed period)

recommendations.product_name: Clearblue Digital / Early Detection Pregnancy Test (Clearblue Digital)
cons: Digitals can require higher hCG for a positive (may be less sensitive very early)

recommendations.product_name: Wondfo Early Result Pregnancy Test Strips (25-count)
pros: Very affordable for bulk/ frequent testing
Reported high sensitivity (many users report early detection)
cons: Strip format (requires urine cup) and occasional mixed user reports on batch variability
Some users report faint lines that require careful timing
